memory_fragments.content: A childhood birthday party where everyone sang your name
The last conversation with someone you'll never see again
Walking home in the rain without an umbrella, feeling completely free
The smell of your grandmother's kitchen during holidays
A moment of pure terror in a place that should have been safe
Laughing until your stomach hurt with friends you've lost touch with
The exact moment you realized childhood was ending
A song that played during your first kiss
Standing in an empty house for the last time
The weight of a secret you've never told anyone
Running through sprinklers on a summer afternoon
The sound of footsteps following you in the dark
A dream so vivid you thought it was real for years
The moment you first understood what loneliness meant
Building sandcastles that the tide would inevitably wash away
